summary: New Seller Copilot panel adds checklist header, first-sale milestone progress bar, and TaskQueue integration for new_seller workflow. Vietnamese fixture copy, shared no-op executor, integration tests for tasks/milestone/approve. No TikTok API calls.

interfaceChanges.description: New-seller workflow panel: checklist header, milestone bar, delegates to TaskQueue.
Visual first-sale milestone progress with Vietnamese label and percent bar.
Pure helper computing milestone % from mock profile order count and GMV.
Renders NewSellerCopilotPanel when workflowId is new_seller; other workflows unchanged.

mappings.criterion: Checklist tasks render for new-seller persona with Vietnamese titles
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_new_seller_copilot.test.tsx::integration: new-seller persona renders at least 3 tasks with Vietnamese titles

mappings.criterion: Each task explains why it matters (Vietnamese copy from fixtures)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_new_seller_copilot.test.tsx::integration: each task shows Vietnamese justification body from fixtures
web/src/__tests__/test_new_seller_copilot.test.tsx::integration: first-sale milestone progress is visible with Vietnamese label

mappings.criterion: Approve/dismiss via shared executor; empty state without layout breaks
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_new_seller_copilot.test.tsx::renders empty state when all checklist tasks are completed in session

mappings.criterion: Integration test: approve removes task from active queue
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_new_seller_copilot.test.tsx::integration: approve removes task from active queue
web/src/__tests__/test_task_card_executor.test.tsx::no API calls on approve or dismiss
